August 5 & 6, 2026
Gillette Stadium | Foxborough, MA

I hope you have a great concert!

Vinyl decal instructions

  1. 1Make sure your surface is clean and dry.
  2. 2Peel the white vinyl liner away from the transfer tape and design.
  3. 3If the vinyl doesn't separate, rub the liner back on and try again — it'll give.
  4. 4Press a small area of the design onto your surface first.
  5. 5Use something flat (a credit card works great) to firmly rub the design down.
  6. 6Slowly peel the transfer tape away at a low angle.
  7. 7If any part lifts, rub it back down and try again — patience wins!

💜 MOST IMPORTANTLY: Have fun and take care of each other 💜
